sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100705" key="sunnauage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνναυᾱγέω</orth>, <sense id="n100705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer shipwreck together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:300" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">300</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
